title: Buttery Chewy Portuguese Almond Cookies
description: Indulge in these buttery, chewy Portuguese cookies, featuring the warmth of ground nutmeg and the crunch of almonds, perfect for a Jain-friendly dessert. These cookies are whisked to perfection for a delightful treat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, followed by the vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, ground almonds, nutmeg, and salt.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Scoop tablespoon-sized balls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, leaving 2 inches of space between each cookie.
Garnish each cookie with a sliced almond.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
